meaning: n.攀登悬崖时的小立足点,排除障碍的方法
examples: The firm is anxious to gain a toehold in Europe.
Delta`s agreement with Singapore Airlines gave them a toehold in the Pacific.
A few of these spores found a toehold on the dark, forbidding rocks and grew and began to work their transformation upon the land.
Last year, Norilsk bought U.S.-based Stillwater Mining to gain a toehold in North America.
When other joint projects failed, this toehold on a better future for the two Koreas remained.
